prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为15465→14509→16934→16712→19448名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年位次19448名较2024年大幅后移约2700名，为近 五年最大降幅，显示该校在浙江的录取门槛明显松动，报考热度有所下降；该校在浙江省招生计划持续扩增：2021年10人→2022年13人→2023年13人→2024年32人→ 2025年36人→2026年51人。2026年计划较2025年增加15人，增幅约41.7%，为历年最大扩招幅度，显著增加了录取机会，对位次有下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工 大学（盘锦校区）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享大连理工大学主体办学资源。软科中国大学排名2026年主校位列第28名，属国内顶尖工科院校行列，盘锦校区与主 校同代码招生，学历证书一致，层次认可度高；2026年高考周期内大连理工大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第 55位（较热），但盘锦校区独立关注度低于主校；历史投档异常记录可能对考生报考心理产生一定滞后影响；大连理工大学拥有化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土 木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等10个A-及以上学科。盘锦校区招生专业中能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术A+（王牌学科），经济学类对应工 商管理A，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程属化工大类，社会舆论呈明显劝退态势；经济学类呈分化观望；生物科学类属生化环材大类，热度偏低。浙江省2 026年高考报名总人数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧，对位次有上推作用。；大连理工大学（盘锦 校区）位于辽宁省盘锦市，距浙江省较远，地域偏好对浙江考生吸引力有限。该校在浙江招生占比逐年提升，2026年计划51人已属该校在省外较大生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招41.7%的稀释效应、浙江省考生总数激增37.6%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校声誉偏负面、专业热度分化等因素，预计2026 年录取位次。预测最低录取位次约24110名，区间23610–24610名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物科学类（盘锦）（含生物信息学、生物科学专业）
- 生物信息学（盘锦）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 能源化学工程（盘锦）（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程专业）
- 海洋技术（盘锦）
- 智能海洋装备（盘锦）（2026年新增专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（盘锦）（含电子商务、经济学专业）
- 生物制造（盘锦）（2026年新增专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约24110名，区间23610–24610名。位次在区间下限（23610名）以内可重点冲刺一档生物科学类/生物信息学专业；位次在区间中段（约24110名）建议以二档能源化学工 程、海洋技术为主力填报，兼顾专业实力与录取概率；位次在区间上限（24610名）附近或以外，建议以三档经济学类保底，同时关注2026年新增的智能海洋装备、生物制造等专 业可能存在的低分机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were 15465 → 14509 → 16934 → 16712 → 19448, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking of 19448 was approximately 2700 places lower than in 2024, marking the largest decline in five years, indicating a significant loosening of admission thresholds and a decrease in application popularity for this university. The enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province has been continuously expanding: 10 in 2021 → 13 in 2022 → 13 in 2023 → 32 in 2024 → 36 in 2025 → 51 in 2026. The 2026 plan increases by 15 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 41.7%, the largest expansion in history, significantly increasing admission opportunities and exerting a downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing the main campus's educational resources. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranks 28th, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities. The Panjin Campus uses the same admission code as the main campus, and the academic certificates are consistent, ensuring high recognition. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Dalian University of Technology's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal admission cutoffs or signals of score drops. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively popular), but the Panjin Campus's independent attention is lower than the main campus. Historical abnormal admission records may have a lagging psychological impact on candidates. Dalian University of Technology has 10 A- or above disciplines, including Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+), Mechanics (A), Civil Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), and Software Engineering (A). Among the Panjin Campus's enrollment majors, Energy Chemical Engineering corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+, a flagship discipline), and Economics corresponds to Business Administration (A), highlighting strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Energy Chemical Engineering belongs to the chemical engineering category, with public opinion showing a clear trend of discouragement. Economics shows divided and wait-and-see attitudes. Biological Sciences belong to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials category, with low popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Zhejiang Province college entrance examination is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% from 291,000 in 2025, intensifying competition and exerting an upward push on rankings. Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, far from Zhejiang Province, and its geographical preference has limited appeal to Zhejiang candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang has been increasing year by year, with a plan of 51 students in 2026, making it one of the larger source regions outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the dilution effect of a 41.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 37.6% surge in Zhejiang candidates, and factors such as the university's somewhat negative reputation and differentiated major popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 24110, with a range of 23610–24610.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Biological Sciences (Panjin) (including Bioinformatics and Biological Science majors)
- Bioinformatics (Panjin).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (Panjin) (including Energy Chemical Engineering and Chemical Engineering and Industrial Biological Engineering majors)
- Marine Technology (Panjin)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (Panjin) (new major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Economics (Panjin) (including E-commerce and Economics majors)
- Biomanufacturing (Panjin) (new major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 24110, range 23610–24610. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (23610) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Biological Sciences/Bioinformatics majors. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 24110) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Energy Chemical Engineering and Marine Technology as main choices, balancing major strength and admission probability. Candidates with rankings near or beyond the upper limit (24610) are advised to use Tier 3 Economics as a safety option, while also paying attention to potential low-score opportunities in new majors like Intelligent Marine Equipment and Biomanufacturing in 2026.
